general.info: Projects are listed in chronological order based on their creation date. My most recent and ongoing projects are located at the very bottom.

userland.title: UserLand
userland.descr: Group of projects for UserLand system.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.content:
This very project. Very minimal and static, as nothing is needed besides list of all projects that I created.

Features:

  • multiple CSS themes
  • multiple languages

ptasks.title: PTasks
ptasks.content: Single file project (not counting unit tests etc) demonstrating efficient processing of large CSV files and performing calculations on it.

tictactoe.title: Tic-tac-toe
tictactoe.content:
Simple Vue project implementing Tic-Tac-Toe game.

Status: finished.

Features:

  • human vs human or human vs AI
  • difficulty levels, including perfect gameplay (using miniMax algorithm)

reversi.title: Reversi
reversi.content:
Simple Angular project implementing Reversi game.

Status: finished.

Features:

  • human vs human or human vs AI
  • difficulty levels (using miniMax algorithm with Alpha-Beta pruning)

userland-backend-java.title: UserLand backend in Java
userland-backend-java.content:
Backend Java project created from scratch showing full implementation of user management. Backend is on GCP.

Status: finished.

Features:

  • user: registration, activation, login, logout, password reset, account edit, account deletion
  • email via provider (JavaMailSender or Resend)
  • permissions: standard user or admin panel operator
  • administration panel: viewing user and related data like user history, editing accounts, account lock/unlock
  • system: lockdown, system history

userland-frontend-vue.title: UserLand frontend in Vue
userland-frontend-vue.content:
Frontend Vue project created from scratch showing full implementation of user management.

Status: MOSTLY COMPLETED.

Features:

  • custom components: checkbox, combobox, radiobox, date/time picker - full support including keyboard and ARIA
  • user webpage: registration, login, logout, password reset, account edit, account deletion
  • administration panel: viewing user and related data like user history, editing accounts, account lock/unlock
  • other: responsive web design (RWD)
